title: Sleep Network Overlay — Sound Cuelist
description: artifacts/sound_cuelist.json — music + SFX + ambient cues. category drives the per-category drift budget (sfx 0.15s / music 0.5s / ambient 2s) in qa_audio_drift; sfx cues MUST carry an anchor_phrase (an unanchored accent drifts). SFX assets are library-only (HARD RULE 1, qa_ui_sfx_coverage / search_sfx.py). additionalProperties stays open for compiler extras; known fields are type-checked.

asset.description: library SFX filename (SFX library-only) or music track path

anchor_phrase.description: contiguous word-run in the source Whisper transcript (required for sfx)

level_lufs_peak.description: peak level for sfx accents (after 10:00 hard cap -20)

event_cue_id.description: binds an impulsive SFX to its visual event (qa_sfx_event_sync)

period.description: music period tag for after-10:00 period-appropriate selection
